name: psst-gpt
description: Relay Codex prompts to the ChatGPT macOS desktop app and return the visible response.

interface.shortDescription: Send ChatGPT app tasks without focus stealing.
interface.longDescription: PsstGPT controls an already-open macOS ChatGPT desktop app window through strict-background Accessibility automation, sends text prompts into the app composer without foregrounding ChatGPT, waits for a stable visible assistant response, stores app-session metadata, and returns the response to Codex. It is an independent desktop-app implementation inspired by the original Chrome-backed GPT Relay by Prompt Case, but it does not use Chrome or the browser extension.
defaultPrompt: Send this to the ChatGPT app.
Continue in the active ChatGPT app chat.
